title: Patata Atomika
description: The original mod created by TeddiGamer where the Patatas Atomikas come to life!
body:
![Background of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e7c5a6603899ac25649c2ca301b2b56857b46f0.png)

🥔 The original **Patata Atomika** mod from **2017**, created by TeddiGamer, is here! With all its ores, materials and even food...

This iconic mod has been brought back to life so that everyone can enjoy this strange food and its radioactive mineral.

**Everything is possible in the world of Patatas Atomikas!**

![NEW ORE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a74dae620b0c9a4f4bfa05e4e16f2f4675f3d550.png)

##

![ABOUT MOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d9b1d358a5a630879e326e88adf14827e17943d.png)

🥔 **Patata Atomika** brings to Minecraft the "Patata Atomika", an iconic food from content creator TeddiGamer.

Players will have to discover a new mineral that will allow them to obtain a material powerful enough to create the ultimate food!

![NEW MATERIAL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dffdc57da3a0ea76c0fc4ec00eabd1a7553c9375.png)

##

![THE CONTENT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c060b94128c78ae3761f599dbd88794ac2785b4b.png)

🥔 In **Patata Atomika** you can find:

- New food.
- New material.
- New ore.

![NEW FOOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54318fec80f7245a0702a26d5db6d07a73caeb6c.png)

##

![THE CREATOR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee3acb09c69a96a896e0b287680ec6f1d38f63bc.png)

🥔 **TeddiGamer** is the creator of this crazy mod.

Being a video editor and also an image editor, he now also enters the vast world of mods.

**Follow me on my social networks!**
